ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the flight took place */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the flight took place */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the flight took place */,
  "dep_time" INTEGER /* Actual departure time */,
  "sched_dep_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "dep_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arr_time" INTEGER /* Actual arrival time */,
  "sched_arr_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "arr_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Airline carrier */,
  "flight_num" INTEGER /* Flight number */,
  "tailnum" TEXT /* Tail number of the plane */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport */,
  "dest" TEXT /* Destination airport */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., Domestic, International) */,
  "flight_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in miles or kilometers */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., Scheduled, Departed, Arrived, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_carrier FOREIGN KEY ("carrier") REFERENCES carriers ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_dest FOREIGN KEY ("dest") REFERENCES airports ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_tailnum FOREIGN KEY ("tailnum") REFERENCES planes ("tailnum")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "code" TEXT /* Airport code (e.g., JFK, BQN) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet or meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "code" TEXT /* Carrier code (e.g., B6) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the carrier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the carrier */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the carrier was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the carrier's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planes" (
  "plane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plane */,
  "tailnum" TEXT /* Tail number of the plane */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of plane */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the plane */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the plane was manufactured */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the plane */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Maximum range of the plane in miles or kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the passenger is booked on */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home or contact address of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger (for international flights) */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Class of travel (e.g., Economy, Business, First Class) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Passenger ID the booking belongs to */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the booking is for */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_ins" (
  "check_in_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check-in */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Passenger ID the check-in belongs to */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the check-in is for */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the check-in was made */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the passenger checked in */,
  "baggage_count" INTEGER /* Number of bags checked in by the passenger */,
  "seat_assignment" TEXT /* Final seat assignment after check-in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_in_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "baggage_claims" (
  "baggage_claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baggage claim */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Passenger ID the baggage claim belongs to */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the baggage claim is for */,
  "baggage_claim_date" TEXT /* Date the baggage claim was made */,
  "claim_number" TEXT /* Unique claim number for the baggage */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the baggage claim (e.g., Lost, Damaged) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the baggage claim (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baggage_claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baggage_claims_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baggage_claims_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the delay belongs to */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "estimated_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time after the delay */,
  "compensation" TEXT /* Compensation provided to passengers due to the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the cancellation belongs to */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the cancellation was made */,
  "rescheduled_flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rescheduled flight, if applicable */,
  "compensation" TEXT /* Compensation provided to passengers due to the cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_cancellations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_cancellations_rescheduled_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("rescheduled_flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Passenger ID the notification belongs to */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the notification is for */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Delay, Cancellation, Gate Change) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_notifications_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_notifications_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_reroutings" (
  "rerouting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rerouting */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the rerouting belongs to */,
  "rerouting_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rerouting */,
  "new_route" TEXT /* New route taken by the flight */,
  "estimated_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time after the rerouting */,
  "new_aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the new aircraft, if different */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rerouting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_reroutings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_diversions" (
  "diversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversion */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the diversion belongs to */,
  "diversion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the diversion */,
  "new_destination" TEXT /* New destination of the flight */,
  "estimated_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time at the new destination */,
  "new_aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the new aircraft, if different */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_diversions_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Flight ID the update belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the flight */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the flight is operating */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal where the flight is operating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_updates_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
